allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const u = process.env.DATABASE_URL || ''''; console.log\(''Has URL:'', !!u\); console.log\(''Host:'', u.split\(''@''\)[1]?.split\(''/''\)[0] || ''N/A''\); console.log\(''DB:'', u.split\(''/''\).pop\(\)?.split\(''?''\)[0] || ''N/A''\)")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const u = process.env.DATABASE_URL || ''''; console.log\(''Has URL:'', u.length > 0\); console.log\(''Host:'', \(u.split\(''@''\)[1] || ''''\).split\(''/''\)[0] || ''N/A''\)")
